step.name: extract-primitives
step.action: Pull primitive values: colour scales, spacing scale, type ramp, radii, shadows. Write to primitive.json.

step.name: author-semantic-tier
step.action: Define semantic aliases (text/primary, surface/raised, border/strong, action/danger). Each alias references a primitive.

step.name: author-component-tier
step.action: Per-component tokens for variant states (button.primary.bg.hover). Reference semantics only.

step.name: emit-per-platform
step.input: All three tiers + Style Dictionary config
step.action: Run Style Dictionary build. Verify CSS, JS, Swift, Android outputs.
step.decision-gate: If platform outputs disagree on a token value, the JSON source is wrong; fix at the source, regenerate.

step.name: audit-figma-parity
step.action: Diff token JSON against Figma variables export. Resolve divergences or document via ADR.
